overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing exploration of an ancient Greek marble quarry. The player character walks through the quarry observing workers mining stone with pickaxes, then ascends wooden scaffolding to an upper platform where a woman stands near an objective marker.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air marble quarry pit with mining workers

agents.ego_description: walking forward through the quarry floor observing workers mining stone

notable_agents.action: kneeling and using a hammer to work on stone blocks
swinging a pickaxe against the quarry wall

entered.detail: tall rough-hewn stone wall of the quarry pit
tall vertical stone wall with tool marks and chisel scars
wooden support beams and platforms built against the left wall
simple wooden storage box sitting on the ground
pile of broken stone fragments and dust

segments.scene_description: The player character walks through the floor of an ancient marble quarry, surrounded by high stone walls. Several workers are mining stone with hammers and pickaxes in the pit. Wooden scaffolding runs along the left wall, and the ground is covered in dirt and stone debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden scaffolding staircase ascending the quarry wall

events.description: character turns right toward the wooden stairs and begins ascending the scaffolding

agents.ego_description: climbing the steep wooden stairs built against the quarry wall

entered.detail: steep wooden staircase made of logs and planks built into the quarry wall
coiled rope lying on the wooden stairs

segments.scene_description: The character turns right and begins ascending a steep wooden staircase built into the quarry wall. The sky becomes mostly blocked by the scaffolding overhead, creating diffused lighting. The quarry wall is now closer on the right, and the ground is now wooden planks rather than dirt.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper quarry platform with stone cutting area

events.description: emerging from the enclosed stairs onto the open upper wooden platform

agents.ego_description: approaching a woman standing on the upper platform near a large basket

notable_agents.action: standing still holding a clay vessel, facing the quarry wall

entered.detail: flat wooden platform at the top of the stairs with log construction
vertical stone wall at the back of the upper platform
large woven wicker basket for holding stone or tools

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an upper wooden platform at the top of the quarry wall. A woman in white robes stands near the back wall holding a vessel, next to a large wicker basket. The area is open to the sky with direct sunlight illuminating the stone cutting area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the dusty floor of an ancient marble quarry up to a sunlit elevated platform. It begins by tracking the character through the pit, where workers mine stone with hammers and pickaxes amidst high walls and debris. As the character turns right, the scene shifts from the dirt ground to a steep wooden staircase, with the overhead scaffolding gradually blocking the sky and diffusing the light. The camera then ascends the planks until it emerges from the shadows onto an open upper platform. Finally, the environment opens up to direct sunlight, revealing a woman in white robes standing by a vessel and a large wicker basket.
